original_image_tags: Back of a document page. The page is aged, off-white/cream paper. At the top center is a black circular hole-punch mark. Faint, reversed text from the front side of the page is visible through the paper (show-through). The page is covered in multiple blue ink rubber stamps, oriented in different directions.

elements.description: Multiple overlapping blue ink stamps on a page with faint, illegible typed text visible from the reverse side. Visible stamp text includes: 'RECEIVED - DIRECTOR U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE F.B.I. APR 25 11:23 AM 49', 'RECEIVED - LADD U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE F.B.I. APR 25 5:00 PM 49', 'RECEIVED - FLETCHER APR 26 10:18 AM 49', 'RECEIVED - F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE APR 25 4:41', 'MAY 26 7:41 PM 49', and 'JAN 2 10:29 AM 49'.

judge.reason: Description A states there are 'multiple blue ink rubber stamps' but gives no readable text, while Description B lists specific, verbatim text for six distinct stamps with dates, names, and times, indicating a major discrepancy in the level of visual detail provided.
